description: The universal quantifier expressing completeness without exception. More than mere enumeration, 'theula' acknowledges the wholeness of a set—every member included, none overlooked. It carries the philosophical weight of totality while remaining grounded in the specific: not abstract 'everything' but 'all of these particular beings or things.'
sound_symbolism: The word opens with 'the', where the soft dental fricative 'θ' breathes across the tongue like a gentle wind touching every surface, missing nothing. The mid vowel 'e' establishes presence before opening into 'u', the rounded vowel of encompassing embrace. Finally, 'la' flows outward with liquid 'l', suggesting the gathering that includes rather than excludes. Together, 'theula' creates the sound of completion—breath touching all, then gathering into wholeness.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a quantifier preceding nouns: 'theula miona' (all people), 'theula nila' (all days). Following modifier-first principle, appears before what it quantifies. Can combine with plural marker: 'theula lo melu' (all friends). Unlike numerals, does not combine with classifiers—totality transcends categorization. Implies definite reference: 'theula' refers to all of a known or contextually established set.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The concept of totality without exception reflects the Buddhist understanding of interconnection—when we say 'all beings,' we truly mean all, without the mental habit of excluding those we find difficult. 'Theula' practices inclusive awareness.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: By providing a word for genuine totality, Phi enables speakers to make truly universal statements about peace, dignity, and care. 'Theula miona sela na hisu' (all people must feel peace) leaves no one outside the circle of concern.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Regenerative thinking requires whole-systems awareness. 'Theula' supports the solarpunk recognition that solutions must work for all, not just some—that true sustainability includes every element of the system.

tags.cognition: Expresses complete set membership, fundamental to logical and inclusive thinking
tags.community: Enables statements about entire groups without exclusion
